Representation Abstraction.comment: Literal depiction of the phenomenon and described concept.

contextualAttributes.comment: The color of the moons and their tails is matching the planet they orbit around.

visualChannels.comment: Every planet has a different surface.
Each planet is rotating on a different speed.
The number of moons orbiting around the planet.
Since the moons are occupying most of the time the same space, we have a case of density besides count as well.

contextualAttributes.comment: They are placed in a grid layout.
